case_title: MARIA ELENA GUERRA VS. FARAH ANJAM et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MARIA ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT ANJAM, FARAH MOHAMMAD, MIRZA DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-29-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-14-2012
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MARIA ELENA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-14-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
